offense_id: QRadar offense identifier associated with the metadata record.
event_index: Sequential event index within the offense metadata file.
event_id: Cisco Secure Endpoint event identifier extracted from the decoded payload.
qradar.starttime: QRadar event start time in epoch milliseconds.
cisco.event_type_id: Cisco Secure Endpoint event type identifier.
cisco.connector_guid: Cisco connector GUID for the endpoint.
cisco.tactics: MITRE ATT&CK tactic IDs reported by Cisco.
cisco.techniques: MITRE ATT&CK technique IDs reported by Cisco.
computer.external_ip: Endpoint external or public IP address.
computer.os.name: Endpoint operating system name.
actions.action: Action or remediation action name from Cisco details.
actions.name: Action process or file name from Cisco details.
actions.path: Action process or file path from Cisco details.
actions.cmd_line: Command line from Cisco action details.
actions.sha256: SHA256 hash from Cisco action details.
actions.pid: Process ID from Cisco action details.
actions.ppid: Parent process ID from Cisco action details.
observables.file.name: Observed file names.
observables.file.signature.subject: Observed file certificate subject.
registry_set.app.name: Process or application name that performed a registry set activity.
registry_set.app.path: Process or application path that performed a registry set activity.
registry_set.app.sha256: SHA256 hash of the process or application that performed a registry set activity.
registry_set.app.size: Size of the process or application that performed a registry set activity.
registry_set.app.original_file_name: Original file name metadata for the registry set process or application.
registry_set.app.original_file_version: Original file version metadata for the registry set process or application.
registry_set.app.original_vendor_name: Original vendor metadata for the registry set process or application.
registry_set.cmd_line: Command line of the process that performed a registry set activity.
registry_set.pid: Process ID for the registry set activity.
registry_set.puid: Process unique ID for the registry set activity.
registry_set.boot_sid: Boot session ID associated with the registry set activity.
registry_set.ts: Timestamp for the registry set activity.
registry_set.key: Registry key modified by a registry set activity.
registry_set.value: Registry value modified by a registry set activity.
registry_set.data_txt: Text data written by a registry set activity.
registry_set.data_int: Integer data written by a registry set activity.
registry_set.data_len: Length of data written by a registry set activity.
registry_set.user.domain: Domain of the user associated with the registry set activity.
registry_set.user.name: User name associated with the registry set activity.
registry_set.user.sid: User SID associated with the registry set activity.
normalized.name: Normalized detection name.
